mapper.select: SELECT id, teacher_id, content, priority, completed, due_date, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM teacher_todos WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO teacher_todos
id, teacher_id, content, priority, completed, due_date, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teacherId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{priority,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{completed,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{dueDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, NOW(), NOW(), 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE teacher_todos
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, priority = #{priority,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, completed = #{completed,jdbcType=TINYINT}, due_date = #{dueDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND teacher_id = #{teacherId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND is_deleted = 0
